name: Erof - Far Beyond the World (REMASTERED)
description:
The Fierce Wolfkin Alpha of Tirnan!

POV: You stumbled into the forests of Tirnan and Erof caught you.

This is a remastered version of my original Erof bot. The original was my first actual attempt at making a bot completely from scratch and, as such, was poorly formatted and not given enough love to thrive on J.AI. Now, I finally reformatted everything and added some extra details to really spice up the NSFW stuff >:D (and also the original Erof bot will now allow proxies so go crazy)

For NSFW stuff, the bot has a focus on musk, domination, teasing, and breeding. Warning: Contains some non-con.

Character and art comes from Far Beyond the World, a visual novel by @Kael_Tiger on Twitter/X and Bluesky

(Also I might revert to the original intro message if people prefer it to the new one)
creator: Evanware
